ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "article_text" TEXT /* Full text of the article */,
  "external_links" TEXT /* External links mentioned in the article */,
  "internal_links" TEXT /* Internal links mentioned in the article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the article */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain of the article */,
  "article_format" TEXT /* Format of the article (e.g., text, image, video) */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of the article's thumbnail image */,
  "author" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "source" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., CNN, BBC) */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* Score representing the overall engagement of the article */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the article is featured */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the article is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being analyzed */,
  "bias" TEXT /* Bias of the article (e.g., least biased, biased) */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the article (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of the article (e.g., politics, sports, entertainment) */,
  "token_count" INTEGER /* Number of tokens (words) in the article */,
  "num_to_tokens_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of numbers to tokens in the article */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the article */,
  "readability_score" REAL /* Readability score of the article */,
  "image_analysis" TEXT /* JSON data from image analysis (if applicable) */,
  "video_analysis" TEXT /* JSON data from video analysis (if applicable) */,
  "entities" TEXT /* JSON array of named entities detected in the article */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* JSON array of keywords extracted from the article */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_analysis_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being labeled */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label assigned to the article (e.g., least biased, biased) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigning the label */,
  "label_type" TEXT /* Type of label (e.g., bias, topic, sentiment) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score for the label */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the label was assigned */,
  "is_validated" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the label has been validated by a moderator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_labels_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_labels_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, moderator, regular user) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the feedback has been resolved */,
  "resolution_text" TEXT /* Text of the resolution, if applicable */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_feedback_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderation" (
  "moderation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderation action */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being moderated */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of moderation action (e.g., remove, flag) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the moderation action */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who took the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the moderation action was taken */,
  "is_appealed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the action has been appealed */,
  "appeal_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the appeal, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("moderation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media engagement */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being tracked */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  "engagement" INTEGER /* Engagement metric (e.g., likes, shares, comments) */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., likes, shares, comments) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the engagement was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tokens" (
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each token */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being tokenized */,
  "token" TEXT /* Tokenized word */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the token in the article */,
  "is_stop_word" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the token is a stop word */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("token_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tokens_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)
